Record Class OperatingSystemInfo

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
io.joshuasalcedo.os.domain.hardware.OperatingSystemInfo
All Implemented Interfaces:
OSHardwareObject
public record OperatingSystemInfo(String family, Manufacturer manufacturer, String versionInfo, String buildNumber, String codeName, int bitness, int processCount, int threadCount, Instant bootTime, long uptimeSeconds, boolean elevated, OSEnvironment osEnvironment) extends Record implements OSHardwareObject
Value object representing operating system information.

  • Constructor Details

    • OperatingSystemInfo

      public OperatingSystemInfo(String family, Manufacturer manufacturer, String versionInfo, String buildNumber, String codeName, int bitness, int processCount, int threadCount, Instant bootTime, long uptimeSeconds, boolean elevated, OSEnvironment osEnvironment)
      Creates an instance of a OperatingSystemInfo record class.
      Parameters:
      family - the value for the family record component
      manufacturer - the value for the manufacturer record component
      versionInfo - the value for the versionInfo record component
      buildNumber - the value for the buildNumber record component
      codeName - the value for the codeName record component
      bitness - the value for the bitness record component
      processCount - the value for the processCount record component
      threadCount - the value for the threadCount record component
      bootTime - the value for the bootTime record component
      uptimeSeconds - the value for the uptimeSeconds record component
      elevated - the value for the elevated record component
      osEnvironment - the value for the osEnvironment record component

  • Method Details

    • uptimeFormatted

      public String uptimeFormatted()

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
